questions.question: The Peace of Westphalia, which ended the Thirty Years' War, was signed in which year?
Who was the first emperor of the Roman Empire?
In which year did the Byzantine Empire finally fall to the Ottoman Turks?
Which Carthaginian general led elephants across the Alps during the Second Punic War?
The Meiji Restoration, which led to enormous changes in Japan's political and social structure, occurred in which century?
Which 1215 document limited the power of the English monarchy?
Who was the primary author of the Declaration of Independence?
The Battle of Waterloo in 1815 marked the final defeat of which leader?
Which ancient civilization developed the system of writing known as Cuneiform?
What was the name of the series of programs launched by FDR to provide relief during the Great Depression?
The Edict of Nantes (1598) granted religious rights to which group in France?
Who was the first woman to win a Nobel Prize?
The Peloponnesian War was fought between which two Greek city-states?
Which Chinese dynasty was responsible for the majority of the existing Great Wall?
Which explorer is credited with the first circumnavigation of the Earth, although he died during the voyage?
